title: Lost connection to the server during MCP Client execution
symptom: When executing an MCP Client node, the n8n UI displays 'Lost connection to the server'. Despite this, the backend process continues running.
applies_when: Running n8n behind an NGINX reverse proxy
not_this_if: Error occurs without using a reverse proxy
root_cause: The NGINX reverse proxy was not configured to handle WebSocket connections properly. n8n relies on WebSockets for real-time communication, and without the correct configuration, the connection is lost during long-running workflows.
fix_steps: Update the NGINX configuration to support WebSocket connections and increase timeout settings.
Edit the /etc/nginx/sites-available/n8n file with the provided configuration.
Test the NGINX configuration using 'sudo nginx -t'.
Reload NGINX with 'sudo systemctl reload nginx'.
agent_instruction: Update the NGINX configuration to support WebSocket connections and reload NGINX.
